title: County Promotion Deterministic Writer

deterministicRules.packageRegistry: Convert only the matching community.<county>-tx package from reserved/planned to active controlled-promotion metadata.
deterministicRules.runtimeRegistration: Add only the requested county runtime entry with county-owned runtime sources and existing package paths.
deterministicRules.searchHomeAreaRegistration: Requires deterministic local community mapping; blocks instead of guessing.
deterministicRules.awarenessRegistration: Requires deterministic boundary-derived bounds and deterministic awareness-area data; blocks instead of guessing.
deterministicRules.boundaryOverlayRegistration: Requires discoverable standard Texas county boundary GEOID.

actualPromotion.promotionRunEvidenceNote: Per-run persisted evidence remains pending until a safe promotion succeeds; this V793 certification does not fabricate promotion evidence.

notes: The tool preserves -WhatIf and -Json output behavior while reporting deterministic blockers.
The tool blocks an entire batch before writing if any requested county fails readiness or deterministic edit gates.
No production crossing, crossing, or community package contents were modified.
